# openai_project_hosted_tool_permissions (Resource)

Manage project hosted tool permissions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_project_hosted_tool_permissions" "example" {
  project_id               = "proj_123"
  file_search_enabled      = true
  web_search_enabled       = true
  image_generation_enabled = true
  mcp_enabled              = true
  code_interpreter_enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `code_interpreter_enabled` (Boolean) code interpreter enabled
- `file_search_enabled` (Boolean) file search enabled
- `image_generation_enabled` (Boolean) image generation enabled
- `mcp_enabled` (Boolean) mcp enabled
- `project_id` (String) project id
- `web_search_enabled` (Boolean) web search enabled
